Issues: The image is very basic and lacks complexity, which limits its commercial appeal unless targeted specifically at minimalist graphic design niches.
The artistic execution is simple; it does not showcase advanced technical skill or high creativity necessary for high-end commercial sales.
The aesthetic (simple skyscrapers and flat color fields) is highly common, reducing its uniqueness in the crowded digital art space.
There are no inherent issues regarding intellectual property or appropriateness for a general audience.
